headline: Choice Hotels (CHH) Appoints CVS Data Chief To Board As Index Changes Hit
summary: Choice Hotels International (NYSE:CHH) has appointed Ali Keshavarz, CVS Health's President and Chief Data & Analytics Officer, to its Board. The company is also undergoing changes across several indices, including removals from certain value and small or mid cap benchmarks. At the same time, Choice Hotels has been added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index. Choice Hotels International enters this news cycle with its stock trading at $109.61 and a mixed return profile. The shares are up 14.1%...
